triggers.value: (^You (?:killed|defeated) the (?:.*))|^(You find (?:.*)[!])|(?:You (?:get|take) (.*) (copper|silver|gold|platinum) (?:coin|coins) from (?:.*) corpse)|(?:Total value: (?:(.*) platinum))|(?:You (?:take|get|pick) (?:.*) (unusual|peculiar|exotic) (?:.*) from (?:.*) corpse)|(?:^You are (just beginning on the path to|very far from|a long distance from|a fair distance from|just under halfway to|just over halfway to|getting closer to|fairly close to|very close to|on the verge of) (?:.*) (novice|greenhorne|beginner|apprentice|wanderer|adventurer|adept|great adventurer|veteran|expert|rising hero|hero|titan|champion|legend|myth)[.])|(You finally recover)|(^You eat (?:.*) (?:leaf|leaves|flowers|flower|rose|bud|mushroom|mushrooms|berry|berries|apple|fruit|fruits|moss|weed|weeds|riverweed|vine|lichen|alga|bean|root|carrot|bulb|potato|onion|bark|gras|grass|straw|trefoil|wreath|stalk|nut|fern|fungus|pumpkin|seeds|sap|stalk|frond)[.])|(^You feel ready to consume another herb)|(^You smash (?:.*) on your forehead|You feel the energy of the egg leaving you)(Ability used|Ability ready again)
triggers.name: Trax 1
